notes: PromptMate button visible at bottom-right corner on claude.ai after page load.
Navigated to google.com; no PromptMate button found anywhere on the page. Button correctly absent on unsupported site.
Panel opened showing search bar, Tone & Format row, PINNED and RECENT prompt sections, and + New prompt button.
Clicking × (Close) button in panel header closed the panel. PromptMate button remained visible at bottom-right.
Re-clicking the PromptMate button while panel was open did not close it. Button stays labeled 'Open PromptMate'; second click switched panel to floating mode rather than closing it.
Searched 'kimi'; header showed '1 RESULT FOR "KIMI"' and only kimi1 was displayed.
Searched 'updated again' (body-only text); kimi1 prompt appeared in results confirming body search works.
Searched 'xyznotfound'; displayed '0 RESULTS FOR "XYZNOTFOUND"' and 'No prompts match "xyznotfound".'
Clicking × inside search bar cleared the field and restored full prompt list.
Searching 'KIMI' (uppercase) returned same result as 'kimi'. Search confirmed case-insensitive.
Tone & Format section expanded to show TONE and FORMAT dropdowns on click; collapsed back showing 'Tone: None · Format: None'.
TONE dropdown showed exactly 5 options: None, Professional, Friendly, Concise, Technical.
FORMAT dropdown showed exactly 5 options: None, Paragraphs, Bulleted List, Numbered Steps, Markdown Table.
Set Tone: Professional, Format: Bulleted List; collapsed label correctly showed 'Tone: Professional · Format: Bulleted List'.
With tone/format set, clicking Use injected prompt body plus tone/format modifier appended to the text.
RECENT section displays prompts with title, body preview, Use button, and usage count (Nx).
Library was not empty during testing (pre-existing prompts present). Could not test empty state without deleting all data.
PINNED section appeared above RECENT; pinned prompts showed pin icon. Confirmed ordering correct.
After using 'test promtp1', it remained at position 4 in RECENT after panel close/reopen. Order appears to be creation-based, not usage-recency-based.
Clicking Use injected prompt body text into claude.ai textarea. Panel remained open after injection.
Usage counter incremented by 1 after clicking Use. Confirmed on deepseek1 (7× → 8×) and test promtp1 (4× → 5×).
Pinning a prompt moved it to PINNED section above RECENT. Pin icon appeared on card; menu item changed to 'Unpin'.
Unpinning returned prompt to RECENT. PINNED section disappeared when empty. Menu item reverted to 'Pin'.
Pinned both deepseek1 and AutoTest-TC037-edited simultaneously. Both appeared in PINNED; RECENT showed only unpinned prompts.
+ New prompt button opened modal with TITLE field (placeholder 'E.g. Improve tone') and PROMPT BODY field ('Write your prompt here...').
Created 'AutoTest-TC032' prompt. Card appeared at top of RECENT. 'Prompt added.' toast displayed. Syncing... indicator visible.
Clicking Cancel in New prompt modal closed it without saving. Prompt count unchanged.
Attempting Save with empty title showed 'Title and prompt body are required.' validation message. Save blocked.
Attempting Save with title filled but empty body showed same 'Title and prompt body are required.' validation. Save blocked.
'Edit prompt' modal opened pre-filled with current title and body text of the selected prompt.
Edited title to 'AutoTest-TC037-edited'. 'Prompt updated.' toast shown; card reflected new title.
Clicking Cancel in Edit modal closed without saving. Original title 'AutoTest-TC032' remained unchanged.
Clearing title in Edit modal and saving showed 'Title and prompt body are required.' Validation blocked save.
Clearing body with title filled in Edit modal showed same validation error. Save blocked.
Copy action placed text in clipboard but navigator.clipboard.readText() timed out in browser context. Could not programmatically verify clipboard contents.
Version History modal opened showing 'Current' revision with green label, and past revisions with 'Show changes' and 'Restore' buttons.
Clicking 'Show changes' on a past revision expanded diff showing TITLE and BODY sections with green text (additions) and red strikethrough (deletions).
Revisions listed newest-first with timestamps. 'Hide changes' collapsed diff back to 'Show changes'. History order confirmed correct.
Clicking Restore on a past revision showed 'Prompt restored.' toast. New 'Current' revision appeared at top of history list.
Only 6 revisions existed during testing. Could not create 10+ revisions to verify cap without excessive editing cycles.
Deleting AutoTest-TC032 via ··· > Delete moved it to Trash. Prompt disappeared from main library.
Deleted prompt visible in Trash with label 'Deleted today · expires in 30 days'.
Clicked Restore in Trash on a deleted prompt. Prompt disappeared from Trash and reappeared in main library RECENT.

'Delete forever' button triggers native window.confirm() in the extension's isolated content script world. CDP commands blocked for 30s timeout. Pressing Enter afterward was unreliable. Item remains in Trash.
Navigated to Trash via global ··· menu > 'Recently deleted'. Navigated back to library via ··· menu > 'Prompt library'. Both transitions worked correctly.
'Syncing...' indicator appeared at bottom of panel after data changes (prompt creation, edit, use). Disappeared after sync completed.
After page reload, all prompts persisted. PINNED: test promtp1. RECENT: deepseek1, kimi1, chagpt1 all present with correct use counts.
Created AutoTest-TC054 on claude.ai with body 'Cross-platform sync test prompt created on claude.ai'. Syncing... indicator appeared.
Email 'jitan.developer@gmail.com' visible in panel footer.
'Sign out' button present in panel footer. Button presence verified only — not clicked per test protocol.
Clicking 'User Guide' opened new tab to https://jitangupta.com/promptmate-guide. (Page returned 404 but link opened correctly.)
'Rate PromptMate' link present in panel footer.
'Request a feature' link present in panel footer.

Created prompt with 100+ character title 'AutoTest-TC060-This title is intentionally very long to test the one hundred character edge case limit for prompt titles'. Saved without error; card appeared in RECENT (title truncated with ellipsis in UI).
Created prompt with 1000+ character lorem ipsum body. Saved without validation error. Clicking Use injected full body into claude.ai chat textarea correctly.

Created prompt with body containing <script>alert('xss')</script>, double quotes, & ampersand, and 🚀 emoji. Saved as plain text (no XSS executed). Injection into chat input preserved all special characters as plain text.
Created second prompt with title 'AutoTest-TC054' (duplicate of existing). Saved without validation error. Both prompts with same title coexisted in RECENT.
Opened New prompt modal, pressed Escape — modal remained open. Pressed Escape a second time — modal still open. Escape key does not close modal on claude.ai.
Navigated to chatgpt.com; PromptMate button visible at bottom-right. No login wall encountered.
Panel opened showing search bar, Tone & Format row, PINNED section (test promtp1), RECENT section, and + New prompt button.
Clicking × (Close) button in panel header closed the panel on chatgpt.com. PromptMate button remained visible.
Re-clicking PromptMate button while panel was open did not close it. Same behavior as claude.ai — button stays labeled 'Open PromptMate'.
Searched 'AutoTest'; header showed '1 RESULT FOR "AUTOTEST"'; only AutoTest-TC054 appeared.
RECENT section visible with prompts (AutoTest-TC054, deepseek1, kimi1) including title, body preview, Use button, and usage counts.
PINNED section (test promtp1, 4×) appeared above RECENT. Confirmed ordering correct.
Clicked Use on AutoTest-TC054; body 'Cross-platform sync test prompt created on claude.ai' appeared in ChatGPT's contenteditable input div. Panel remained open.
AutoTest-TC054 usage counter incremented from 0 to 1× after clicking Use on chatgpt.com.
'Syncing...' indicator visible at bottom of panel on chatgpt.com after opening panel.
AutoTest-TC054 (created on claude.ai) appeared in chatgpt.com panel immediately upon panel open. Cross-platform sync confirmed.
Email 'jitan.developer@gmail.com' visible in chatgpt.com panel footer.
'Sign out' button present in chatgpt.com panel footer. Not clicked.
